title: Black White Rembrandt Intellectual Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Black White Rembrandt Intellectual Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Subject: pensive adult man with round glasses, black sweater, metal wristwatch and pencil raised near his face appears as the pensive adult portrait subject, with neatly styled hair, light stubble, round glasses, black sweater, wristwatch detail, and a pencil raised near the face. Scene: dark studio backdrop, gaze tilted upward, shallow depth of field creates the dark minimalist studio setting, upward-away gaze, shallow depth of field, and moody fine-art atmosphere. Composition: Fixed minimalist close portrait composition: subject faces camera area but gazes slightly up and away, pencil held near the face, wristwatch and hand detail visible, dark backdrop surrounding the head and shoulders, and clean negative space without props clutter. Signature Elements: Round glasses, pencil raised near face, metal wristwatch, pensive upward gaze, black sweater, Rembrandt light from the left, deep shadows, and minimalist fine-art atmosphere. Style: High-contrast black-and-white editorial photography with cinematic fine-art mood, ultra-detailed facial texture, tack-sharp optics, and restrained intellectual character study. Color Palette: Pure monochrome palette with deep blacks, luminous skin grays, bright catchlights, metal watch highlights, and smooth dark backdrop gradients. Lighting: Left-side Rembrandt lighting, strong cheek and nose shadow, deep background falloff, crisp glasses highlights, and controlled contrast on hand, pencil, and watch. Camera: 85mm f/1.8 portrait look, shallow depth of field, crisp subject detail, soft dark bokeh, and tight editorial crop. Materials: Round eyeglass glass, matte black knit sweater, metal wristwatch, wooden pencil, facial stubble, styled hair, and dark studio backdrop texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
